inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 basic EPS HK$14.05 normalized down for peak turnover / margin-fund pass-through (below spot EPS)
inputs.normalization_note: Peak activity FY2024–FY2025; base owner cash below reported EPS HK$14.05

bull.notes: Sustained China / derivatives activity + LME fee stack

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Connect schemes, LME, and unlisted stakes are embedded in consolidated croupier cash flows; no separate terminal option row

growth_explanation.mechanism: Trading and clearing fees scale with cash-equity average daily turnover and derivatives activity; Connect programs add structural volume; margin-fund investment income is partly rate-sensitive.
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: HKEX FY2024 annual report and Q1 2026 results (IR); normalized below peak EPS
falsifiers: Sustained collapse in headline ADT below HK$100B for four quarters
Regulatory fee caps on core trading or clearing tariffs
